videos.title: Iran Holds Tight Hold on to 'Hormuz' Despite Ceasefire... "Only 10 Ships Allowed Per Day" What Ab...
videos.subtitle_summary: Iran continues to tightly control the Strait of Hormuz despite a ceasefire, limiting the number of ships passing daily to around 10. They require ships to coordinate with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and pay fees in cryptocurrency or Chinese yuan. The strait, which is a crucial energy shipping route, was previously used by over 135 ships per day, but even on the day of the ceasefire announcement, only a few ships had passed through. Despite the truce, reports of Israeli attacks on Lebanon and Iran's retaliation have caused the passage to be suspended again. During the war, Iran enforced control over the strait by attacking unauthorized ships, and now they are attempting to formalize this control. They allow passage for ships from their own or friendly countries at low costs, but block ships connected to the U.S. or Israel. The shipping routes must use narrow channels and fees are applied differently, with a maximum fee of up to 30 billion won for large oil tankers. After seven Iranian oil tankers and 26 of our own were seized, discussions on passage plans have been held between various government departments. Experts predict that even if the truce is maintained, it will take a significant amount of time for shipping to return to normal due to Iran's lack of clear safety guarantees. (SBS News)

videos.title: [핫라인] 이란, 호르무즈 내 대체항로 제시···선박 통제 강화하나?
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 이란은 호르무즈 해협에서 대체 항로를 제시했다. 이는 해협을 안전하게 통과할 수 있도록 위험 지역을 알려주고, 실제로는 이란 해군의 직접 통제 아래로 모든 선박을 놓고자 하는 것으로 보인다.
2. 이란은 호르무즈 해협을 자신들의 영해처럼 관리하기 위한 전략적 포석으로, 국제법상 항행의 자유를 무력화하고 통행세를 받아내려는 의도가 있다고 보인다.
3. 이란의 대체 항로 구상대로 호르무즈 해협을 통과할 수 있는 선박은 하루 12척으로 제한되어, 현재 800여척의 선박들로도 160일이 걸릴 것으로 예상된다.

videos.title: [Today's News] Democratic Party Seoul Candidate "Jeong Won-oh Confirmed"... 'No Surprise' Advance...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. The final result of the primary election for the Seoul Mayor candidate of the Democratic Party has been announced, with Jeong Won-oh receiving the most votes and being confirmed as the final candidate without a runoff election.
2. Soo Byeon-hoon, Chairman of the Central Election Management Committee of the Democratic Party, made the announcement.
3. The rules state that if a candidate receives more than 50% of the vote in the first round, they are confirmed as the final candidate without a runoff election; otherwise, a runoff election is held between the top two candidates with the most votes. In this primary election, Jeong Won-oh received over 50% of the votes, so no runoff election was necessary.

videos.title: [Breaking] Jeong Won-oh Confirmed as Democratic Party of Korea’s Seoul Mayoral Candidate… Secures...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Jeong Won-oh has been confirmed as the Democratic Party of Korea's candidate for Seoul Mayor in the upcoming local elections.
2. Since he received more than half of the votes in the primary election, no runoff vote is required and Jeong Won-oh is officially the party's candidate for Seoul Mayor.
3. The final result of the Democratic Party's primary election for Seoul Mayor was announced, with Jeong Won-oh being selected as the party's official candidate.

videos.title: Seoul's Jeong Won-oh and Busan's Jeon Jae-soo Confirmed as Democratic Party Candidates... Bickeri...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Seoul's Jeong Won-oh (former head of Seoul District Office) and Busan's Jeon Jae-soo (National Assembly member) have been confirmed as the Democratic Party candidates for Seoul Mayor and Busan Mayor respectively. The party has now completed nominations in 10 out of 16 regional districts, with the remaining regions expected to finalize their nominations soon.
2. The focus of the Democratic Party is shifting towards the by-election for the mayoral position in Seoul (referred to as "Bo-Gyeon" election). The most notable region to watch is Busan's Buk-gu, where the possibility of candidates from the Justice Party and the People's Power Party entering the race is being discussed.
3. The Democratic Party has requested the participation of Ha Jung-woo, a senior AI expert at the Blue House, in the by-election, but the Blue House has maintained distance on the matter.

videos.title: Jeong Won-oh Confirmed as Seoul Mayoral Candidate… Advances Direct to Main Election with Majority...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Jeong Won-oh, a former Seoul district chief, has been confirmed as the Seoul mayoral candidate for the Democratic Party (민주당). He advanced directly to the main election with a majority vote in the primary election.
2. The competition for the Seoul mayoral seat is heating up between three candidates: Jeong Won-oh, Oh Se-hoon from People Power (국민의 힘), and Park Ju-min from another party. The results of the primary election were announced recently, with Jeong receiving the most votes and advancing to the main election without a runoff.
3. In Busan, the Democratic Party is expected to announce its mayoral candidate at 6:50 PM today between two candidates: Jeom Jae-seong and Choi Jae-sung. If Jeom wins, the Democratic Party will have confirmed candidates for mayor in 16 out of 23 major cities. The primary elections are expected to be completed by the end of April.

videos.title: *선공개* [정원오 Part .1] 드디어 입 열었다! 칸쿤 동행 직원의 진실 🏖️ 정원오가 직접 밝히는 고속 승진 의혹
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 배지요는 2회의 방송 중에 펭귄 통신에서 연락을 받았습니다. 펭귄 통신은 법정 최대 지원금과 더불어 추가 혜택을 제공하며, SK 인터넷과 TV를 월 11,000원에 이용할 수 있는 프로모션 중입니다.
2. 정원호 후보는 대권 프로젝트와 관련하여 질문을 받았습니다. 그러나 자세한 내용은 밝혀지지 않았습니다.
3. 정원호 후보는 인지도를 높이기 위해 입소문을 퍼트리고 있었으며, 이를 통해 대통령에 갈 수 있다고 말했습니다.

videos.title: [한미반도체 주가 전망] 4월9일, 늦은밤 초대형 속보 보셨습니까! "이게 사실입니까! 내일 난리 나겠네요". #한미반도체주가전망 #한미반도체 #한미반도체주가 #한미반도체전망
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 4월 9일 목요일에 방송을 시작합니다. 지난 날은 증시가 상승세를 보여주었으나 하루 만에 다시 하락 패턴을 보였습니다. 하지만 한미 반도체는 오히려 상승이 나왔습니다.
2. 전쟁 문제로 인해 하락이 일어난 것은 지난 시점에서 저점 매수 타이밍으로 보입니다. 전쟁 문제가 해소되면 구조상 올라갈 수밖에 없습니다.
3. 지난 3월 5일 목요일 오전에서 말씀드렸던 것과 같이, 지금도 큰 반등이 나올 수 있으며, 한미 반도체는 올해 더 높은 곳으로 올라갈 수 있습니다.

videos.title: 세계 첫 암모니아선 건조…“대체 연료 선박 시장 선점” / KBS  2026.04.09.
videos.subtitle_summary: HD 현대 중공업은 세계 최초로 암모니아를 연료로 사용하는 46,4세제m급 가스 운반선을 건조했습니다. 이는 친환경 무탄소 연료인 암모니아의 주목을 받고 있으며, 국제 에너지 기구는 2050년까지 암모니아 연료 비중이 46% 증가할 것으로 예상했습니다. HD 현대 중공업과 한화션은 차세대 선박 연료로서 암모니아를 적용하는 무탄수 선박 기술 개발에 속도를 내고 있습니다.
